expectations.evidence: Original: ~90 words. Distilled: ~40 words. Compression: 56%. Below 60% threshold but close.
'One command governs all local services' — doesn't specify it's a CLI tool, doesn't name the service types (databases, queues, caches). 'Start, stop, monitor' present but vague about what.
'new developers lost to setup; veterans lost to silent drift' — both reasons present, though expressed poetically.

'nothing remembered, nothing forgotten' is poetic but ambiguous — could mean the tool forgets nothing, or the user needs to remember nothing. 'The environment must manage itself, or it manages no one' is a philosophical statement that doesn't convey concrete functionality.
